testcase.name: apiBase URL construction (pure) > returns file-service URL with port 8084
apiBase URL construction (pure) > returns wrongbook-service URL with port 8082
apiBase URL construction (pure) > returns ai-analysis-service URL with port 8083
apiBase URL construction (pure) > returns review-plan-service URL with port 8085
apiBase URL construction (pure) > all prefixes resolve to distinct ports
api/file.ts exports > exports presign function
api/wrongbook.ts exports > exports createQuestion function
api/wrongbook.ts exports > exports getQuestionById function
api/wrongbook.ts exports > exports listWrongQuestions function (T07)
api/ai.ts exports > exports getAnswerByQid function
api/ai.ts exports > exports startAnalyze function
api/ai.ts exports > exports pollAnalyzeStatus function
api/home.ts exports > exports getHomeTodayCount function
api/review.ts exports > exports completeSession function (T13)
api/review.ts exports > exports createSession function (SC-01-C05 #1)
api/review.ts exports > exports getToday function (SC-01-C05 #2 · T09 P07)
api/review.ts exports > exports getNode function (SC-01-C05 #3)
api/review.ts exports > exports openNode function (SC-01-C05 #4)
api/review.ts exports > exports revealNode function (SC-01-C05 #5)
api/review.ts exports > exports gradeNode function (SC-01-C05 #6)
api/review.ts exports > exports nextInSession function (SC-01-C05 #7)
api/review.ts exports > exports nodeResult function (SC-01-C05 #8)
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > returns a string containing day of week + month + date
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > contains a separator dot · between parts
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > ends with a period-of-day greeting
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > contains day name from 周一..周日
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 0 when total is 0
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 100 when done equals total
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 50 for half done
computeCirclePct (pure) > rounds to nearest integer
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 0 when done is 0
computeCirclePct (pure) > handles large numbers
derivePageState (pure) > returns LOADING when data is null and no error
derivePageState (pure) > returns ERROR when data is null and hasError
derivePageState (pure) > returns EMPTY when total is 0
derivePageState (pure) > returns READY when total > 0
derivePageState (pure) > returns READY even if hasError but data exists
derivePageState (pure) > EMPTY takes precedence over error when data.total = 0
T14 · review-done onEnd (P09→P-HOME transition) > calls completeSession with session id before navigating
T14 · review-done onEnd (P09→P-HOME transition) > navigates to /pages/home/index via wx.reLaunch (primary target)
T14 · review-done onEnd (P09→P-HOME transition) > falls back to /pages/capture/index when home page fails
T14 · review-done onEnd (P09→P-HOME transition) > navigates even if completeSession throws (best-effort)
T14 · review-done onEnd (P09→P-HOME transition) > uses reLaunch (not navigateTo) to clear navigation stack
extractNidFromTap > extracts string nid from dataset
extractNidFromTap > converts numeric nid to string
extractNidFromTap > returns null for missing dataset
extractNidFromTap > returns null for empty string nid
extractNidFromTap > returns null for null nid
extractNidFromTap > returns null for undefined event
extractNidFromTap > returns null when currentTarget missing
buildExecUrl > builds correct URL with sid and nid
buildExecUrl > encodes special characters in sid
buildExecUrl > encodes special characters in nid
buildExecUrl > URL is parseable with URLSearchParams
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > ≤ 15 min → state "now", label "X 分钟"
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > 0 min → "0 分钟" (never negative)
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > 15 min boundary → still "now"
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > 16-120 min → state "soon", label in hours
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > 120 min boundary → still "soon"
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > > 120 min → state "wait", label "X h Y m"
buildCountdown (pure logic · no backend) > exact hours → no trailing "m"
formatHHMM (pure) > pads single-digit hours and minutes
formatHHMM (pure) > does not pad double-digit hours
formatHHMM (pure) > midnight → 00:00
getSlotKey (pure) > hour < 12 → "now"
getSlotKey (pure) > hour 12-17 → "afternoon"
getSlotKey (pure) > hour >= 18 → "evening"
getSlotTitle (pure) > "now" → "现在 · 上午"
getSlotTitle (pure) > "afternoon" → "下午"
getSlotTitle (pure) > "evening" → "晚上"
getSlotIconClass (pure) > maps slot keys to CSS classes
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > groups morning items into "now" slot
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > groups afternoon items into "afternoon" slot
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > mixed times → multiple slots in order
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > empty items → empty slots
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > countdown state for items near now
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > tLevel format matches T{nodeIndex}
buildSlotsFromItems (pure · integration of all helpers) > hhmm formatting with padding
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns "已逾期" when nextDueAt is in the past
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns minutes when due < 1 hour from now
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns "1 小时后" when due is 1-2 hours away
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns hours when due is 2-24 hours away
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns "明日 09:00" when due is 1-2 days away
formatDueLabel (pure · no backend) > returns "N 天后" when due is > 2 days away
formatTimeAgo (pure · no backend) > returns "刚刚" for < 1 minute
formatTimeAgo (pure · no backend) > returns "N 分钟前" for 1-59 minutes
formatTimeAgo (pure · no backend) > returns "今日 HH:MM 入库" for same-day
formatTimeAgo (pure · no backend) > returns "昨天" for 1-2 days ago
formatTimeAgo (pure · no backend) > returns "N 天前" for > 2 days
buildStarsLabel (pure) > returns correct number of stars
buildStarsLabel (pure) > clamps to 0-5 range
enrichItem (pure · derives display fields) > maps subject to label and color
enrichItem (pure · derives display fields) > maps masteryLabel to text and color
enrichItem (pure · derives display fields) > builds stageDots with correct done/now markers
enrichItem (pure · derives display fields) > truncates stemShort to 20 chars
enrichItem (pure · derives display fields) > falls back to NOT_MASTERED config for unknown masteryLabel
api/wrongbook.ts exports (no HTTP) > exports listWrongQuestions function
